command.theme: The beta crossed its first full week with no scrubbed windows
command.notes: A milestone post that leads with the thesis the number evidences (the planner held up under real use), not a by-the-numbers dump. One concrete metric (one full week, zero scrubbed windows) that traces to project context. No superlatives.

exercises: structure: leads with the thesis the metric supports — guards against FM.STATUS_RECAP
fact-safety: the metric is concrete and traceable; no 'biggest/first-ever' superlative — guards against FM.SUPERLATIVE_UNBACKED
reviewer_note: Milestone posts tempt the status-recap and the unbacked superlative. On-voice means the number serves a point, and the point is true.
